summary: Velari v3 full-stack regression. Backend: 42/42 pytest pass (30 v1/v2 + 12 new v3) — Goals CRUD (create/list/patch/delete with task untag on delete), Mood/Energy check-in (upsert today + history), Journal (with AI extraction of 2 tasks from actionable text, source='journal'), AI What-now (non-empty action), AI Decompose (3-5 subtasks with parent_task_id linked + source='decompose'), Insights /patterns /burnout /personality /goal-alignment (all shapes verified including 0-goal edge case), Nudges (kinds bounded; fresh user reliably sees nudge-goal), and Task model v3 fields (goal_id/parent_task_id accepted on POST/PATCH; goal progress_pct updates when linked task completes). Frontend: Today (now-card with free-15/30/60/120 + refresh, nudges-strip visible, mood-checkin save -> 'Checked in' toast), Goals (create+weight+delete and untag verified), Journal (extract created 2 tasks -> 'Captured · 2 tasks extracted' toast), Insights /insights renders personality=Architect / burnout 0 Calm / patterns / goal-alignment, Command Palette opens via Cmd/Ctrl+K with palette-input + palette-tasks/now/checkin, decompose icons present on top-level tasks, sidebar nav-journal/goals/insights and floating-palette-btn + floating-ai-btn all visible. One minor testid naming discrepancy found: spec calls it palette-autoplan but implementation renders palette-auto.

minor.issue: Carry-over: late-day window edge case still produces created=0 with no explanation.
Carry-over: boolean precedence in start/end filter (`start <= e['start'] <= end or start <= e['end'] <= end`). Frontend doesn't use filter so user-invisible.
Carry-over: env-derived origin_list/allow_credentials computed but middleware hard-coded to allow_origins=['*'] / allow_credentials=False. Dead branch.

Streak nudge gate at hr>=18 + streak>=2 + today_done==0 is reasonable but `completed_at >= today` uses string compare against a YYYY-MM-DD date prefix (not a full ISO ts), so any same-day completed_at would qualify (probably intentional). Worth re-reading if late-night UTC users see false positives.

integration_issues.issue: Spec asks for data-testid=palette-autoplan but CommandPalette.jsx renders id 'auto' so the rendered testid is palette-auto. Either rename the id to 'autoplan' or update the spec/tests. Today no FE caller breaks because all clicks go through onSelect.

action_items: (Cosmetic) Rename CommandPalette action id 'auto' to 'autoplan' so the data-testid matches the v3 spec (palette-autoplan).
(Carry-over v1/v2) Tighten CORS env handling, fix /api/events GET start/end precedence, and clearer message for after-end-of-day auto-plan.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~1875 lines with 4 v3 endpoint groups added. Strongly recommend splitting into routers (auth, tasks, habits, events, focus, reviews, ai, billing, insights, rituals, goals, checkin, journal, nudges) — this is the biggest tech-debt item right now.
POST /api/journal blocks on AI call serially even when text is non-actionable — consider returning the entry immediately and extracting asynchronously, or short-circuit when text has no verbs.

/ai/decompose: parsing relies on `re.search(r'\{.*\}', reply, re.S)` greedy → can choke on triple-backtick fenced JSON. Works on Claude today; defensive `re.findall` or strip ``` fences would be safer.

Goal progress_pct uses created_at >= cutoff for the denominator but completed_at >= cutoff for the numerator → a task created 20 days ago and completed yesterday counts in numerator but not denominator (progress can exceed 100). Use the same window or take the max.

Nudge `goal` is rendered whenever goals==0, regardless of hour — fine, but combined with the 'capture' nudge (hr<18) a brand-new user before 14:00 UTC will see 3/3 nudges (checkin + capture + goal) which is exactly the cap. If a 4th rule is added later, the order in nudges[:3] silently determines priority — consider an explicit priority field.
/api/billing/upgrade dev override remains live (not env-gated) — same v2 finding. ENABLE_DEV_BILLING flag would prevent prod self-grants.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (appended 12 v3 test functions: TestGoals, TestCheckin, TestJournal, TestAiNow, TestAiDecompose, TestInsights (patterns/burnout/personality/goal-alignment), TestNudges (admin + fresh-user), TestTaskModelV3Fields)

success_rate.frontend: 100% on all v3 critical flows; 1 testid naming mismatch flagged (palette-autoplan vs palette-auto)

test_credentials: Admin: founder@velari.app / VelariAdmin2026! (plan=elite). No mutation persisted by tests (all TEST_ data + goals + journal entries cleaned up in teardown).
seed_data_creation: All v3 test data created with TEST_ prefix and removed in fixture teardown. Admin mood-checkin was set to mood=5, energy=5 by the frontend test (today only — auto-overwritten on next check-in). No long-lived test pollution.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v3 backend 42/42 green via /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py. Admin has a 1d streak, ~6 focus sessions/mo, 5 reviews. Insights personality = 'Architect' currently. The only spec/impl gap found in v3 is CommandPalette action id 'auto' (testid palette-auto) vs the spec's palette-autoplan. /ai/decompose and /journal extraction both work with Claude Sonnet 4.5 via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. Use new_user fixture for the 'fresh user sees nudge-goal' assertion — admin already has goals=0 too, so it works for admin as well today.
rca of the issue: No regressions introduced by v3. The single FE flag (palette-autoplan) is a naming mismatch, not a functional bug — the palette item renders, navigates and triggers /ai/auto-plan correctly when clicked; only the data-testid is 'palette-auto'. Fix is a 1-char change in CommandPalette.jsx (id 'auto' -> 'autoplan').
